reference: As a seventy-three+ year old, I use Cialis. I get strong erections but have difficulty achieving ejaculation; I seem to have forgotten 'how to.' My wife and I have had very good sex in our forty-eight years of marriage, but I am disappointed that most times I fail to 'come.' Please advise.
text: As a seventy-three-plus-year-old, I use Cialis. I get strong erections but have difficulty achieving ejaculation. I seem to have forgotten how to. My wife and I have had very good sex in our forty-eight years of marriage, but I am disappointed that most times I fail to come. Please advise.
